Home

LazyVim File & Directory Management

Essential keymaps for working with files and directories in LazyVim.

File Explorer (NeoTree)

KeymapAction
<leader>eToggle file explorer
<leader>oOpen file explorer (focused)
HToggle hidden files
RRefresh file explorer
aAdd file/folder
dDelete file/folder
rRename file/folder
cCopy file/folder
mMove file/folder

Quick File Open

KeymapAction
<leader><leader>Open file finder (Telescope)
<leader>fFind files in project
<leader>fgGrep in files
<leader>frRecent files

Buffers

KeymapAction
<leader>bcClose current buffer
<leader>boClose other buffers
]bNext buffer
[bPrevious buffer
<Tab>Switch to next buffer
<S-Tab>Switch to previous buffer

File Operations

KeymapAction
:wSave file
:qClose file
:qaClose all files
:wqSave and close
:qa!Close all without saving

Last updated: 2026-04-04
